metadata.title: Turning a clutch corner for a sharp double kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught these foes off guard with a quick peek and steady aim. Sometimes timing is everything in a fast-paced round. Where’s your favorite spot to catch enemies by surprise?

Got a clutch moment like this? Share your best plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps
